svg.title: URL shortener technical architecture
svg.desc: Five-tier architecture: Client, Edge (CDN and load balancer), Application (Redirect Service and API Server), Data (Redis, PostgreSQL, Analytics), and External (Safe Browsing API). Solid arrows show synchronous calls; dashed arrows show async or conditional flows.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What requests does the browser send to a URL shortener?')
sendPrompt('How does the CDN help with URL shortener redirect latency?')
sendPrompt('How does the redirect service work and why is it on the hot path?')
sendPrompt('What does the API server handle — auth, link creation, dashboard?')
sendPrompt('What does Redis cache in the URL shortener and what is the TTL strategy?')
sendPrompt('What tables does PostgreSQL hold in the URL shortener schema?')
sendPrompt('How are click events stored and queried for the analytics dashboard?')
sendPrompt('Which Safe Browsing API is recommended and how is it integrated?')
